dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world... it was burning. A crimson inferno, fueled by the blood of countless warriors.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: At the heart of it all, a single figure stood, battered and broken, yet unyielding.

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) That bastard... The Heavenly Demon. Even after all this, he still wouldn't die.

dialogue.speaker: HEAVENLY DEMON
dialogue.line: Kukuku... Plum Blossom Sword Saint. You are magnificent. But even you cannot defeat true despair!

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) Despair? Hah! I am Cheong Myeong of Mount Hua! I am the Plum Blossom Sword Saint! I will not fall!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! CRACKLE! SHATTER!

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: Plum Blossom Sword Art... Last Blossom!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BOOM! THUD! GURGLE...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The ultimate technique. The final sacrifice. The Heavenly Demon fell, and with him, the Plum Blossom Sword Saint.

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) My body... it gave out. So this is it, huh? At least... I protected Mount Hua. I protected the Murim.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Darkness. Then... a faint light.

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) What is this? A ceiling? And... why is it so dusty? Where am I?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) My body... it's so small. So weak! What happened to my muscles? My qi? This isn't right!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: COUGH! COUGH!

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) This rotten body... it can barely hold itself together. Did I... reincarnate? After hundreds of years?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He dragged himself to a dusty, cracked mirror. A gaunt, unfamiliar face stared back.

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) My face... this isn't mine! And this room... it's so dilapidated. Is this even Mount Hua?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) I need to get out of here. I need to find out what happened. Mount Hua... my Mount Hua. It better not have fallen into ruin!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He stumbled out of the room, down a rickety corridor, and into a courtyard. What he saw made his blood run cold.

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) This... this is Mount Hua? This desolate, crumbling place? Where are the disciples? Where is the grandeur? The Plum Blossom Forest is overgrown, the training grounds are empty!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WIND WHISTLES

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) Those damn disciples! After I sacrificed everything, after I single-handedly saved the Murim, they let my sect fall into such a state?! Unbelievable! Unforgivable!

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) My qi... it's practically non-existent. But even with this pathetic body, I am still Cheong Myeong!

dialogue.speaker: CHEONG MYEONG
dialogue.line: (Thought) I'll restore Mount Hua. I'll make it glorious again. And those lazy, incompetent descendants... they'll pay for this! Just you wait, Mount Hua! Your ancestor has returned!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SIGH... (followed by a determined grunt)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A new chapter for the Plum Blossom Sword Saint had begun, not as a revered hero, but as a furious, reincarnated ancestor in a world that had forgotten him.

summary: The Plum Blossom Sword Saint, Cheong Myeong, defeats the Heavenly Demon but dies in the process. He awakens centuries later in a new, weak body, only to find his beloved Mount Hua Sect in a state of utter ruin, fueling his determination to restore it.
